channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Birdseed scattered all over pavement, 17th March
item.description:
Dried birdseed / dried peas scattered on pavement. I slipped on this earlier today and have damaged my wrist. It’s a hazard for anyone walking that way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 231, Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bikes, 17th March
item.description:
Been there a very long time no changes wheelchair user had to be helped yesterday can not pass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beehive Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 17th March
item.description:
This bin is overflowing again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piquet Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped washing machine, 17th March
item.description:
I reported this washingmachine which has been dumped on the footpath/cyclepat at the bottomof elephant lane on Sunday 8th March.It is still there today. Please can your remove it. many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cottle Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic wheelie bins blocking footpath, 17th March
item.description:
There are several recycling, green and garden wheelie bins blocking most of the pavement which is already narrow forcing pedestrians off the footpath and walk on the road. All those bins must be removed and taken inside the respective properties

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westcott Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again, 17th March
item.description:
Flytipping next to planter again. On Lakeview Rd by the postbox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeview Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle parked in our hotel car park, 17th March
item.description:
The vehicle was parked in our hotel car park since 23rd Feb at 0749hrs.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christina Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Fairmount - mattresses, bed steads, 17th March
item.description:
Last week, a load of stuff was dumped. Mattresses, beds, It was dumped by car / minivan with the reg: Ay66 ulj They were dumping some stuff in the skip behind the metal gates - they have access there - but I saw them dumping mattresses on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Raleigh Gardens, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rumble., 17th March
item.description:
This pile has been on the pavement for 5 or more days. Its rubble, bricks, tiles etc of all shapes and sizes and hazardous to both pedestrians and vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nuxley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing encampment, 17th March
item.description:
Princess Diana Gardens, Thornbury Close. At least 2 tents, 3 bikes, luggage, bags, piles of things.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thornbury Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo again, 17th March
item.description:
There is always so much dog fouling in the area. Please please add more bins and signs. It’s horrible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Engine idling with owner smoking nearby, 17th March
item.description:
Vehicle parked on Delaware road this morning, no passengers in the car, and owner was outside the car smoking nearby.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163-167, Delaware Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tent encampment in flowerbed, 17th March
item.description:
Sprawling tent camp that has been here for many weeks. More and more items, and rubbish accumulating.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wordsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal pavement parking AGAIN, 17th March
item.description:
Redfern Road - pavement completely blocked by car & van. Ongoing problem but traffic wardens rarely bother visiting to do their job & give issue parking charges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redfern Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones used to reserve parking, 17th March
item.description:
A couple of houses along Bowen Drive have taken to putting out small yellow traffic cones to reserve parking for themselves. I cannot determine which house number it is, but they appear around 17-25 Bowen Drive. Parking is very tight along this road as it is, and the use of these cones makes it even harder for residents. I've noticed this happening a lot over the past few weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Bowen Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping two sofas dumped on pavement outside 362 Seven Sisters Road., 17th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping two sofas dumped on pavement outside 362 Seven Sisters Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seven Sisters Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning machine throwing stones around the street, 17th March
item.description:
Resident reporting the street cleaning machine around 7pm this morning that was used to clean the street has thrown the stones around everywhere , stones were hitting parked vehicles and please could someone look into this and if possible get street swept up again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansunt Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mowers using excessive speed in Cator Park, 17th March
item.description:
2 ride on mowers being used to cut grass on larger grassed area at excessive speed. Mowers traveling in excess of 20 mph in the park . Speed limit is 4 mph for safety as children and dogs are using the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: PLEASE PLEASE RESOLVE - 11th report this year, 17th March
item.description:
ANOTHER fly tip on the corner of Weir road - PLEASE resolve with culprit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Van with NO TAX, 17th March
item.description:
Vehicle abandoned last week with another vehicle. PCN tickets every day received, another van cream colour speeds up in the estate and takes the tickets and drive off. This van has some damages and it has no TAX.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holcote Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
